purchase.answer: To purchase a flag, open a ticket, select your flag, wait for staff approval and follow the instructions.

delivery.answer: Orders are processed by staff. Delivery time depends on availability and current order volume.

payment.answer: Follow the official payment instructions provided inside your order ticket.

support.answer: Our AI assistant is available 24/7. Staff members handle final order approval.

security.answer: Never share private information. Only use official Zey Store tickets.
